message:
feat(mining): add TaintLabel enum for ACIP content safety tracking

Add data structures to support ACIP (Anthropic Content Injection
Protection) taint tracking in extracted patterns:

- TaintLabel enum with variants:
  - Sensitive: content from untrusted source, may contain secrets
  - Redacted: content was sanitized/removed
  - RequiresReview: needs human verification before use

- Optional taint_label field on ExtractedPattern struct with
  skip_serializing_if for clean JSON output when None

This enables the pattern extraction pipeline to propagate security
metadata from tainted session messages to the patterns they generate,
ensuring prompt injection attempts don't pollute the skill database.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
